newClaim.description: Phone screen flickering intermittently after normal use. No physical damage visible. Started 2 days ago and getting worse.

batteryReplacement.description: Battery drains from 100% to 0% in under 3 hours. Battery health report shows 58% capacity.

partnerMessage: Hi, could you share an estimated completion date? My work depends on this device.
feedbackText: Repair was quick and professional. Device working perfectly now.
